name: 1password.local:connect
prose:
# 1Password Connect API

REST API interface for 1Password Connect.

## Getting started

The 1Password Connect API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `http://1password.local`.

## Authentication

Every request must include an `Authorization: Bearer <token>` header with your access token.

## API reference

### GET /activity
Retrieve a list of API Requests that have been made.
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `limit`, `offset`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /health
Get state of the server and its dependencies.
Returns a single record.

### GET /heartbeat
Ping the server for liveness
Returns a single record.

### GET /metrics
Query server for exposed Prometheus metrics
Returns a single record.

### GET /vaults
Get all Vaults
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `filter`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}
Get Vault details and metadata
Returns a single record.

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items
Get all items for inside a Vault
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `filter`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### POST /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items
Create a new Item

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}
Get the details of an Item
Returns a single record.

### PUT /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}
Update an Item

### PATCH /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}
Update a subset of Item attributes

### DELETE /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}
Delete an Item

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}/files
Get all the files inside an Item
Returns a list of records.
Accepts query parameters: `inline_files`.

Sample response:

```json
[ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ]
```

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}/files/{fileUuid}
Get the details of a File
Returns a single record.

### GET /vaults/{vaultUuid}/items/{itemUuid}/files/{fileUuid}/content
Get the content of a File
Returns a single record.
